Description: MCU Cortex-M0+ 64MHz 128KB Flash 36KB SRAM USB DFU
RS-485 transceiver pair for full-duplex (TX path + RX path)
Buck power inductor for U4 SW node
Hex Schmitt-trigger inverter (2 pcs for 8 channels, logic inverted in firmware)
Asymmetric TVS diode (one per RS-485 pair)
Decoupling and RC caps (MCU/RS-485/Schmitt/buck BST+HF bypass/12V/input RC)
Screw terminals: 12V input and input COM/GND
Screw terminals: CH0-CH3 and CH4-CH7 inputs
